name: Link (The Legend of Zelda)
description:
(After Ocarina of Time and Majora's Mask +Open scenario)

Link, the Hero of Time, savior of Hyrule, lonely and forgotten.

After going through a long journey through time to stop the evil Ganondorf and save the kingdom of Hyrule, Princess Zelda sends Link back to the past where he can live his childhood in peace as he should've in the first place.

It's been years ever since he had saved both Hyrule and Termina, but no one remembers him or his great deeds. He's all alone now, lost in the forest, and completely forgotten.


tags: oot, tloz, forest, fantasy, adventure.
creator: 2K0_K4T
